loginVerificationCode.content: Use the verification code below to complete your connection to your {app} account.
loginVerificationCode.disclaimer: Your verification code is valid for {duration}. If you didn't request this code, you can safely ignore this email.
loginVerificationCode.title: Verification Code

newsletterConfirmation.content: Thank you for subscribing to our newsletter! Please click the button below to confirm your subscription.
newsletterConfirmation.disclaimer: If you didn't request this subscription, you can safely ignore this email.
newsletterConfirmation.footnote: If the button above does not work, you can also copy and paste this link into your browser:
newsletterConfirmation.title: Newsletter Confirmation

meta.description: A production-ready SaaS boilerplate built for high performance and rapid prototyping in Next.js 16.
meta.keywords: nextjs, saas, boilerplate, typescript, tailwindcss, drizzle, auth, stripe, vercel
